Product Features

  • 3-in-1 Multi-Function Charcoal SmokerThis versatile charcoal smoker offers three functions in one: smoker, grill, and fire pit. Choose the function that best suits your cooking needs and enjoy the charm in your patio, backyard, garden, or during your camping adventures.
  • Back to Traditional TasteOur smoker delivers the classic, delicious flavors of smoked or grilled food. Adding wood chips to the charcoal enhances the flavor during the heating cycle, making it a more flavorful alternative to electric smokers.
  • Spacious Cooking CapacityWith two cooking grates and a top hanging rod for extra space, this smoker offers a large cooking area—perfect for smoking turkeys, ribs, and more. Paired with a smart thermometer and adjustable air vents, it's perfect for hosting a barbecue party with family and friends.
  • User-Friendly DesignEquipped with two access doors for easy operation, you can monitor your cooking and add charcoal with ease. The top and side handles are designed for a secure, non-slip, anti-scald grip to ensure safe handling.
  • Easy Assembly and CleaningWith a simple three-layer structure, this smoker assembles in just 10 minutes using the included manual. Cleaning is a breeze—just remove the smoker lid and scrub the cooking grate at your convenience.

 

Description

 

Material:Steel. Thickness: 0.4mm, Finish:High temperature painted, Cooking area: Dia.38cm,2pcs chrome plated cooking grid, 1pc zinc plated charcoal grid,2pcs water pans,3pcs black Legs, Door size:12*13.8cm Assembly dia:43*80cm With Thermometer. with LFGB,FDA test reportMain Color:Black
